suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-7 launch status and stability assessment
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-7 was targeted for launch today (July 9). As the designated final devnet with a mild spec freeze, confirming successful launch and initial stability is critical before proceeding with further testing or spec refinements.

suggestions.topic: EL spec finalization for devnet-7 (EIP-2780 floor gas, EIP-8037, EIP-8282)
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #86 noted remaining EL spec changes needed resolution by today. If not completed, this blocks devnet-7 launch and testing. If completed, teams need confirmation that execution-specs were released as planned.

ACDT #86 established that only minor parameter-only changes (e.g., gas cost tweaks) are acceptable after devnet-7 launch, not structural changes. With devnet-7 live, teams need clarity on the process for proposing and approving any remaining adjustments.

suggestions.topic: Nimbus fork-choice bug resolution and builder participation
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #86 identified Nimbus self-building instead of using remote builder due to a fork-choice issue with a fix in progress. Confirming resolution is important for ePBS testing coverage on devnet-7.

ACDT #86 documented that Prysm will revert sending multiple newPayloads without FCU, and Besu will likely revert their fix. Teams should confirm both reverts happened and devnet-7 shows no recurrence of the state inconsistency issue.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API breakout takeaways and implementation timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #86 scheduled a Friday breakout for SSZ Engine API. With 3+ implementations ongoing but alignment incomplete (per open action item from ACDT #83), teams should share key takeaways and update on readiness timelines.

suggestions.topic: Devnet-6 consolidation testing completion and findings
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #85 noted consolidation testing was pending for devnet-6. If completed, teams should share results; if not, understand why and whether it impacts devnet-7 confidence.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8282 builder deposit contract parameter choices finalization
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #85 decided on static constants with a disable-switch, but specific values (target/max) were still under discussion (Nico proposed 8/64). If not finalized, this may need quick resolution post-devnet-7 launch for mainnet readiness.
